creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a question more suited to freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org 
than it is to a PR. 

I can tell you right off the bat that you're unlikely to come 
right if it's a modern chip, since FreeBSD 2.2.8 support is 
not actively maintained within the FreeBSD ports tree. 

If recent versions of XFree86 support your graphics card, 
you're encouraged to upgrade to 3.5-RELEASE at least, or 
4.0-RELEASE ideally.  Heck, 4.1-RELEASE is just around the corner.
